title: Create:Tuff
description: No ores?! This mod makes it possible to make a tuff farm! Adding 2 new items and 4 recipes for all of your ore hungry needs!!!
body:
# Create:Tuff

This mod adds a 3 step recipe for tuff and one for more ore gain! 

Featuring two new items: **Volcanic Ash** and **Diamond Shard**

For more information on the process check the _Gallery_ or _JEI_ for all the process!
